title: InfiniteStocks
description: A Minecraft mod that adds infinite trading stock to Villagers.
body:
InfiniteStocks is a simple Minecraft mod that removes trade limits from Villagers, allowing them to trade items endlessly without locking their trades. With this mod, every villager always has full stock, so players never need to wait for restocking or use workstations repeatedly. Perfect for trading halls, large survival bases, multiplayer economies, and speed gameplay. Lightweight, server-friendly, and fully compatible with existing worlds.

<u>**_You need to REOPEN trade page for restock_**</u>
